title: isouratea humilis
intro: Isouratea humilis, also known as the Yellow Root, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the family Gentianaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Isouratea humilis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
